FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.mechanism: Optimizes the retrieval of fast string timestamps in the system.
FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.purpose: Improves performance and speed when accessing time-related string data.

FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.mechanism: Enhances the way fast string flags are tracked using Git hash identifiers.
FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.purpose: Ensures players benefit from the latest updates and features quickly and efficiently.

DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.mechanism: Allows for dynamic updates of string timestamps in real-time.
DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.purpose: Provides players with up-to-date information without delays.

DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.mechanism: Facilitates dynamic tracking of string flags using Git hash for real-time updates.
DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.purpose: Ensures players receive the most current features and improvements seamlessly.
